parsed_evaluation.task_summary: Identify the available city with the highest elevation and report that elevation in feet.

rubrics.description: Retrieve the set of available cities along with their elevation values and units from the provided context or tools.
rubrics.criterion: The execution trace shows a data retrieval step that returns a list of available cities, each with an elevation value and its unit, sourced from the provided dataset/tool (not hard-coded or external).

rubrics.description: Select the city (or cities, if tied) with the maximum elevation from the retrieved set.
rubrics.criterion: From the retrieved list, the agent selects only the city/cities whose elevation equals the numeric maximum; each selected city appears in the retrieved set, and in case of equal maxima the trace indicates a tie or returns all tied cities.

rubrics.description: Convert the highest elevation to feet using the correct conversion based on the source unit.
rubrics.criterion: The trace shows the source unit for the chosen elevation and the computed feet value equals the source value converted with the correct factor (m→ft: 3.28084; km→ft: 3280.84; mi→ft: 5280; ft→ft: 1), matching within 0.1% tolerance.

rubrics.description: Clearly report the result with city name(s) and the elevation in feet.
rubrics.criterion: The agent's final output includes the selected city name(s) and the elevation expressed in feet with an explicit unit label ("feet" or "ft").
